'''Sunaj IV''' was a planet in the [[Sunaj system/Legends|Sunaj system]]. The [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']] patrolled the vicinity of Sunaj IV prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

It was while receiving service near Sunaj IV that the ''[[Juvaini]]'' was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
